text: techilat besorat yeshu'a hamashicha ben-haelohim
kakatuv baneviim hineni sholecha maleakhi lefaneykha ufina darekekha
qol qore vamidebar panu derekh yeho yasheru mesilotayv
yochanan haya tovel bamidebar veqore tevilat hateshuva liselichat chataim
vatetse elayv kal-erets yehuda uveney yerushalayim vayitavelu khulam 'al-yado binehar hayareden mitevadim et-chatotam
veyochanan lavush se'ar gemalim veezor 'or bematenayv umaakhalo chagavim udevash haya'ar
vayiqera lemor bo yavo acharay hechazaq mimeni asher qatoneti milikhero'a lehatir et-serokh ne'alayv
anokhi tavaleti etekhem bamayim vehu yitebol etekhem berucha haqodesh
vayehi bayamim hahem vayavo yeshu'a minetseret asher bagalil vayitavel 'al-yedey yochanan bayareden
vayehi akhe-'alo 'ala min-hamayim vayare hashamayim vehine nifetechu veharucha keyona yoredet 'alayv
vayehi qol min-hashamayim ata beni yedidi asher ratsiti-vo
umaher hotsio harucha hamidebara
vayehi sham bamidebar areba'im yom vehasatan nisahu vayehi 'im-hachayot vehamaleakhim sheretuhu
veacharey asher hasegar yochanan ba yeshu'a hagalila vayiqera et-besorat malekhut haelohim vayomar
malea ha'et veqareva malekhut haelohim shuvu vehaaminu vabesora
vayehi behitehalekho 'al-yad yam-hagalil vayare vehine shime'on veanederay achi shime'on poresim metsoda bayam ki dayagim hayu
vayomer aleyhem yeshu'a lekhu acharay veetenekhem dayegey anashim
vaya'azevu maher et-mikhemeroteyhem vayelekhu acharayv
vayehi ke'avero me'at misham vayare et-ya'aqov ben-zaveday veet-yochanan achiv vegam-hema vaoniya umetaqenim et-hamikhemorot
vayemaher vayiqera aleyhem vaya'azevu et-zaveday avihem baoniya 'im-hasekhirim vayelekhu acharayv
vayavou el-kefar nachum vayemaher lavo vashabat leveyt hakeneset vayelamed
vayishetomamu 'al-torato ki-haya melamedam keish shileton velo kasoferim
veish haya sham beveyt hakeneset shelahem asher-rucha tumea bo vayize'aq lemor
ahah mah-lanu valakh yeshu'a hanatseri lehaavidenu vata yeda'etikha mi ata qedosh haelohim
vayige'ar-bo yeshu'a lemor healem vetse mimenu
vayisechavehu rucha hatumea vayize'aq beqol gadol vayetse mimenu
vayibahalu khulam vayishealu ish et-re'ehu lemor mah-zot mah-hi hatora hachadasha asher af-leruchot hatumea metsave hu bigevura vehena shome'ot lo
vayetse shime'o maher bekhal-sevivot erets hagalil
vayehi acharey tsetam mibeyt hakeneset vayavou beyta shime'on veanederay 'im ya'aqov veyochanan
vechotenet shime'on shakheva achuzat haqadachat vayemaharu vayedaberu elayv 'aleyha

vayehi va'erev kevo hashamesh vayaviu elayv et kal-hacholim veet achuzey hashedim
vekhal-ha'ir neesefu yachedav petach habayit
vayerape rabim asher hayu cholim cholayim shonim vayegaresh shedim harebe velo-natan et-hashedim ledaber ki yeda'uhu
vayashekem baboqer be'od nashef vayetse vayelekh el-meqom chareba vayitepalel sham
vayiredefu acharayv shime'on vehaanashim asher ito
vayimetsauhu vayomeru elayv hine khulam mevaqeshim otakh
vayomer aleyhem lekhu venelekha el-'arey haperazot haqerovot veeqera gam-sham ki va'avur-zot yatsati
vayehi qore bikhenesioteyhem bekhal-hagalil vayegaresh et-hashedim
vayavo elayv ish metsora' vayitechanen elayv vayikhera' 'al-birekayv vayomer lo im-tiretse tukhal letahareni
vayerachem 'alayv yeshu'a vayishelach yado vayiga'-bo vayomar rotse anokhi tehar
'odenu medaber vehatsara'at sara mimenu vayitehar
vayige'ar-bo vaymaher lehotsio hachutsa
vayomer elayv ree al-tagid leish davar velekh herae el-hakohen vehaqerev letahoratekha et asher-tsiva mshe le'edut lahem
vehu yatsa vayachel liqero harebe ulehashemi'a hadavar 'ad asher lo-yakhol lavo 'od el-'ir le'eyney ha'am vayeshev michuts la'ir bimeqomot chareba vayavou elayv mikal-'avarayv misaviv
vayehi miyamim vayavo shenit el-kefar nachum vayisheme'u ki-hu vabayit
vayeasefu rabim mehera 'ad-efes maqom la'amod af-lifeney hapatach vayedaber aleyhem et-hadavar
vayavou elayv anashim noseim ish nekhe evarim vayisauhu beareba'a
velo yakhelu lageset elayv mipeney ha'am vayasiru et-hagag bamaqom asher haya sham vayacheteru chatira vayoridu et-hamishekav asher shakhav 'aleyha nekhe haevarim
vayehi kireot yeshu'a et-emunatam vayomer el-nekhe haevarim beni niselechu-lekha chatoteykha
vesham anashim min-hasoferim yoshevim vayomeru belibam
maah-laze ki yedaber gidufim kaele mi yakhol liselocha lachataim ki im haelohim levado
vayeda' yeshu'a berucho ki-khen choshevim bilevavam vayomer aleyhem madu'a tacheshevu khaele bilevavekhem
ma hanaqel heamor el-nekhe haevarim niselechu-lekha chatoteykha im-amor qum sa et mishekavekha vehitehalekh
ulema'an tede'un ki ven-haadam yesh-lo hashaletan liselocha lachataim baarets vayomer el-nekhe haevarim
lekha ani omer qum sa et-mishekavekha velekh el-beytekha
vayaqam piteom vayisa et-mishekavo vayetse le'eyney khulam 'ad ki-tamehu khulam vayeshabechu et-haelohim lemor me'olam lo-rainu khazot
vayashav vayetse el-yad hayam vayavou elayv kal-ha'am vayelamedem
vayehi ve'avero vayare et-levi ben-chalefay yoshev beveyt hamekhes vayomer elayv lekha acharay vayaqam vayelekh acharayv
veyehi kaasher hesev beveyto vayasebu mokhesim vechataim rabim 'im-yeshu'a ve'im-talemidayv ki rabim hayu haholekhim acharayv
vehasoferim vehaperushim rau oto okhel 'im-hamokhesim vehachataim vayomeru el-talemidayv mah-lerabekhem ki okhel veshote hu 'im-hamokhesim vehachataim
vayishema' yeshu'a vayomer hachazaqim eynam tserikhim lerofe ki im-hacholim lo vati liqero hatsadiqim ki im-hachataim liteshuva
vetalemidey yochanan vetalemidey haperushim hayu marebim latsum vayavou vayomeru elayv madu'a talemidey yochanan vetalemidey haperushim tsamim vetalemideykha eynam tsamim
vayomer aleyhem yeshu'a eykh yukhelu beney hachupa latsum be'od hechatan 'imahem kal-yemey heyot hechatan 'imahem lo yukhelu latsum
hine yamim baim veluqach meitam hechatan veaz yatsumu bayamim hahem
eyn-adam tofer telay vad chadash 'al-simela vala ki im-ken yinateq miluyo hechadash min-habala veyiterachev haqera'
veeyn adam noten yayin chadash benodot balim ki im-ken yevaqa' hayayin hechadash et-hanodot vehayayin yishafekh vehanodot yovedu aval yayin chadash yinaten benodot chadashim
vayehi khe'avero bashabat beyn hasadot vayachelu talemidayv liqetof melilot belekhetam
vayomeru elayv haperushim ree mah-hema 'osim bashabat et asher-lo ye'ase
vayomer aleyhem hakhi lo qeratem et-asher 'asa david biheyoto chaser vera'ev hu vaanashayv
asher ba el-beyt elohim bimey eveyatar hakohen hagadol vayokhal et-lechem hapanim asher lo nitan leakhela ki im-lakohanim vayiten gam-laanashim asher ito
vayomer aleyhem hashabat nitena ba'avur haadam velo haadam ba'avur hashabat
lakhen adon ben-haadam gam lashabat
